{{Quote|One of the most ferocious of all warm-blooded predators in the Agarix sector, the arqet is a murderous predator inhabiting the mountain ranges of the planet Pellastrallas.|Holobrochure for the Tagge Holographic Museum of Chandrila|<ref name="Creatures" />}}
'''Pellastrallas''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Creatures" /> located in the [[Pellastrallas system/Legends|Pellastrallas system]], a part of the [[Agarix sector/Legends|Agarix sector]]<ref name="EAOC Pellastrallas" /> in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of<ref name="TEA Pellastrallas" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC Pellastrallas" /> Its surface featured [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] ranges that were inhabited by the [[arqet]], an aggressive [[Endothermy|warm-blooded]] [[Diet/Legends|predator]] that used camouflage—with its skin changing [[Color/Legends|color]] depending on the amount of [[Star/Legends|solar]] [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] absorbed—to [[Hunting/Legends|ambush]] prey in its rocky habitat. The latter creatures included the smaller [[Ixzinian rock ram]] and [[Uthori breix]],<ref name="Creatures" /> which originated in<ref name="Planetnamia">{{Planetnamia|species=[[Ixzinian rock ram]] and [[Uthori breix]]|system=[[Ixzinia system/Legends|Ixzinia system]] and [[Uthor system/Legends|Uthor system]]|legends=1}}</ref> the [[Ixzinia system/Legends|Ixzinia system]] and [[Uthor system/Legends|Uthor system]] respectively.<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref>

On the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:4:18]], an issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] noted the arqet's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] while reporting on a rampage by one such creature on<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|regional/13418_3.html|Circus Horrificus Turns Horrific}}</ref> the [[Moon/Legends|moon]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. The report misspelled the planet's name as "Pellastrallus."<ref name="HNN" /> An entry of a [[Holo-brochure|holobrochure]] for the [[Tagge Holographic Museum]] of<ref name="Creatures" /> the planet<ref name="CSWE Chandrila">{{CSWECite|I|119|Chandrila}}</ref> [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] dedicated to the arqet and available during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] also mentioned Pellastrallas.<ref name="Creatures" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pellastrallas was mentioned in the [[1994]] sourcebook ''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'', published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The section of the book mentioning the planet was authored by [[Rick D. Stuart]].<ref name="Creatures" /> [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 52|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #52]], a representation of an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] on [[April 18]], [[2002]],<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6493893|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-04-18|time=6:27 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220914072939/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-11#post-6493893}}</ref> misspelled the planet's name as "Pellastrallus,"<ref name="HNN" /> an error that was also included in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|43|arqet}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Pellastrallas [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet, in grid square K-18.<ref name="TEA Pellastrallas" />
